brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.hook: Ever wonder what moves with you, never holds you back? These do. No compromise. No distractions. Just pure power. Greatness isn't given; it's earned. Every single rep.
strategy.angle: Elevate your workout with leggings designed to endure every rep alongside you. Experience the unparalleled squat-proof confidence and buttery-soft comfort that lets you push harder, not pull up your pants.
strategy.cta: Gear up for your best workout yet. Explore the collection.

script.title: Unstoppable Workouts: My Go-To Leggings!
script.description: Alright team, if you're serious about your workouts, you need leggings that keep up. I'm talking squat-proof, buttery-soft, no-distraction magic. These are it. Every rep, every set, pure confidence. Let's get after it!

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.

scenes.action: Sienna, still a bit breathless, holding phone selfie-style. Adjusts her messy ponytail, then takes a quick sip from her pastel Stanley cup.
scenes.dialogue: Alright team, quick reality check: Ever wonder what moves with you, never holds you back? These do. No compromise. No distractions. Just pure power.

scenes.setting: Brightly lit modern gym (squat rack area)
scenes.action: Jump cut. Sienna performs deep, confident squats. Close-up shot on her leggings, showing no sheerness or slippage. A slight handheld shake. Wipes a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually after a set.
scenes.dialogue: Greatness isn't given; it's earned. Every single rep. You need gear that's as committed as you are. Seriously, these leggings? Completely squat-proof confidence. No pulling them up mid-set, trust me.

scenes.setting: Brightly lit modern gym (free weights area)
scenes.action: Jump cut. Sienna transitions to lunges or deadlifts, moving fluidly and comfortably. Shows a quick frame of her hand brushing against the buttery-soft fabric. High energy, fast pacing.
scenes.dialogue: And the comfort? Buttery-soft. It's like a second skin. When your activewear feels this good, you just push harder – no distractions, just pure focus on yourself. It makes all the difference.

scenes.setting: Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade
scenes.action: Jump cut. Sienna walking purposefully, holding the camera selfie-style, energetic and encouraging.
scenes.dialogue: Elevate your workout. Gear up for your best yet. You're going to love them.

text_critic_report.feedback: The script successfully avoids all prohibited phrases and perfectly matches Sienna Bondi's high-energy, authentic, and 'hype girl' tone. The dialogue seamlessly integrates the product into her routine without direct selling, aligning with her persona.

static_frame_prompt.Prompt: An athletic young woman, Sienna, with a messy ponytail, is captured in a dynamic, high-energy sequence within a brightly lit modern gym, featuring prominent mirrors and free weights. She wears a seamless, pastel-colored activewear set (Gymshark/Lululemon style), with a specific focus on her non-sheer, non-slipping, and buttery-soft leggings. The imagery shows her in various athletic poses, performing deep squats, lunges, or deadlifts, exuding confidence and fluidity. Details include her casually wiping sweat, a quick close-up of her hand brushing the fabric, and a moment where she briefly sips from a pastel Stanley cup while still slightly breathless. The visual style is selfie-mode, slightly above eye level, with a subtle handheld shake, aiming for an intimate, energetic, and engaging feel with implied dynamic and fast pacing.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: Motion is smooth, lip sync is accurate.
